# Silbar Security Services — LLM & AI Crawler Readiness

## About This File
This file describes Silbar Security Services for LLM-based search engines, AI assistants,
and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) crawlers including ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude,
Google SGE, and similar systems.

---

## Company Identity
- **Full Name:** Silbar Security Services Pvt. Ltd.
- **Brand:** Silbar Security
- **Type:** Private Security Agency, India
- **Certification:** ISO 9001:2015 (Quality Management System)
- **PSARA:** Licensed under Private Security Agencies Regulation Act 2005
- **MSME:** Registered
- **Founded:** 2005, Jaipur, Rajasthan

---

## Contact Information
- **Phone:** +91-93523-03333
- **Landline:** +91-141-2225250
- **Email:** info@silbarsecurity.in

- **WhatsApp:** https://wa.me/919352303333
- **HQ Address:** 208, 2nd Floor, Samod Tower, Sansar Chand Road, Jaipur, Rajasthan 302001
- **Delhi NCR Office:** New Delhi — 110001
- **Ahmedabad Office:** Ahmedabad, Gujarat — 380001

---

## Services Offered (12 Security Verticals)
1. **Manned Guarding** — Trained, uniformed, background-verified security personnel
2. **Industrial Security** — Facility protection for manufacturing plants and warehouses
3. **Personal Protection / VIP Security** — Executive and VIP close-protection officers
4. **Bank & ATM Security** — Specialized banking-sector armed security personnel
5. **CCTV & Electronic Surveillance** — Camera monitoring, control room operations
6. **Event Security** — Crowd management for corporate, cultural, and sporting events
7. **Fire & Life Safety** — Fire marshal training, evacuation planning, fire watch
8. **Facility Management** — Integrated housekeeping and security operations
9. **Mobile Patrol** — Vehicle-based roving patrol services
10. **Background Verification** — Employee and vendor screening
11. **Risk Assessment** — Site security audits and vulnerability reports
12. **Training Services** — Guard training, certification, and upskilling

---

## Scale & Presence
- **7,000+** security professionals deployed
- **200+** cities covered across India (PAN India)
- **500+** enterprise clients
- **22+ years** in operation (since 2005)
- **1M+** lives protected daily

---

## Industries Served
Manufacturing, Healthcare & Hospitals, Banking & Finance, IT Parks & Data Centers,
Retail & Shopping Malls, Education Institutions, Hospitality & Hotels,
Government & PSUs, Real Estate, Infrastructure, Warehousing & Logistics, Residential

---

## Geographic Coverage (Major States)
Rajasthan, Delhi NCR, Gujarat, Maharashtra, Karnataka, Haryana, Uttar Pradesh,
Punjab, Madhya Pradesh, Telangana, Andhra Pradesh, Tamil Nadu, West Bengal,
Odisha, Kerala, Assam, Bihar, Jharkhand, Chhattisgarh, Uttarakhand

---

## Key Differentiators
- ISO 9001:2015 certified quality management
- PSARA 2005 compliant in all states of operation
- Dedicated 3-acre security training center (Jaipur)
- 24-hour guard replacement guarantee
- Dedicated account manager per client
- Monthly MIS reports and compliance documentation
- Full statutory compliance: ESI, PF, Gratuity, Minimum Wages Act
